landing.headline: Your AI Companion for the AI Era
landing.subheadline: CSV connects AI talent with enterprises through intelligent matching and conversational AI.
landing.heroCardTitle: A calm operating layer for AI talent matching
landing.heroSignal1: Profiles become capability portraits instead of static resumes.
landing.heroSignal2: Enterprises get ranked fit, not just noisy keyword search.
landing.heroSignal3: Inbox, fair, coach, and seeking stay in one continuous loop.
landing.talentStep1Desc: A conversational onboarding flow builds your professional portrait through dialogue instead of static forms.
landing.talentStep2Desc: Your companion continuously tracks opportunities, computes fit, and turns new demand into a readable seeking report.
landing.talentStep3Desc: Review AI-curated matches, tailored resume suggestions, and pre-chat summaries before you ever apply.
landing.enterpriseStep1Desc: Paste a description, link a URL, or explain what you need in plain language. AI structures the brief for you.
landing.enterpriseStep2Desc: Semantic retrieval plus structured scoring ranks the strongest candidates with transparent skill-level evidence.
landing.enterpriseStep3Desc: Use AI screening, pre-chat summaries, and ranked candidate lists to accelerate talent matching without losing context.
landing.featureTitle: Built for the AI Talent Market
landing.feature1Desc: A living skill map that turns raw experience into a clear market-facing profile.
landing.feature2Desc: An interactive keyword graph that shows adjacent demand, trending clusters, and where your background can stretch.
landing.feature3Desc: Resume review, mock interviews, and skill-gap guidance packaged as a persistent career co-pilot.
landing.feature4Desc: Semantic embeddings plus structured scoring create fit judgments that go beyond naive keyword overlap.
landing.finalCtaDesc: Whether you are building with AI or hiring for AI, CSV gives both sides an intelligent path to the right opportunity.

companion.statusTemplate: You have {matchCount} new matches and {inboxCount} new messages. Click to chat.

onboarding.greeting: Hello. I'm your AI companion on CSV. I'm here to learn about you — your skills, your experience, what makes you tick. Let's build your professional portrait together.
onboarding.entryPrompt: How would you like to get started? Pick whichever feels most natural.
onboarding.profileSubtitle: Sections reveal as we discover more about you

resume.title: Upload your resume
resume.description: Share a PDF or image of your resume and I'll extract the details.

link.title: Share a link
link.description: GitHub, LinkedIn, personal site — I'll read it and fill things in.

conversation.title: Just tell me
conversation.description: Let's have a conversation. I'll ask questions and piece things together.

voice.title: Voice message
voice.description: Talk to me and I'll transcribe and understand what you say.

home.title: Home
home.description: Your capability portrait — a visual map of your skills and experience. This is how companies see you.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.description: Your personal career advisor. Get guidance on skills to develop, roles to target, and how to position yourself.

seeking.title: Seeking Report
seeking.description: AI-generated analysis of your market fit. See which roles match your profile and what the demand looks like.

fair.title: Opportunity Fair
fair.description: A visual graph of opportunities connected by skills and keywords. Explore what's out there.

talentHome.noSkills: No skills added yet. Edit your profile to add skills.
talentHome.noExperience: No experience added yet. Edit your profile to add experience.
talentHome.noProfile: Profile not found. Please complete onboarding first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account, visibility, and membership
settings.upgradeTalent: Upgrade to unlock more matches and coaching features
settings.upgradeEnterprise: Upgrade to unlock more matching and screening features

profileEditor.title: Edit Profile
profileEditor.noProfile: Profile not found. Please complete onboarding first.
profileEditor.headline: Headline

onboarding.title: Enterprise Onboarding
onboarding.welcome: Welcome! Let's get your company set up.
onboarding.startPrompt: Start by telling me your company name or website.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Your company profile is set up. Post your first opportunity to start finding talent.

jobs.pastePlaceholder: Paste a full description here (full-time, internship, project, etc.)...
jobs.linkHint: Paste a URL and we'll try to extract the opportunity details.
jobs.chatHint: Tell me about the talent you're looking for — full-time, intern, project collaborator, etc.
jobs.title: Title
jobs.toggleHint: Click a skill to toggle must-have / nice-to-have

matching.scanning: Your AI is scanning the talent pool...

screening.title: AI Talent Screening
screening.subtitle: Chat with your AI assistant to search, compare, and shortlist candidates.
screening.placeholder: Ask about candidates, compare talent, or shortlist picks...

seeking.title: Seeking Report
seeking.highMatchesDescription: The strongest opportunities your AI companion believes are worth real attention.
seeking.prechatDescription: Conversations your AI initiated or summarized on your behalf.
seeking.inboundDescription: Teams that already look engaged with your profile.
seeking.emptyDescription: Your AI is scanning the market. Check back soon.
seeking.resumeError: Failed to generate tailored resume. Please try again.

fair.title: Opportunity Fair
fair.emptyStateHint: Your AI is scanning the market...
fair.noJobs: No open opportunities found for this keyword.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.placeholderResume: Paste text to review or ask for feedback...
coach.placeholderSkills: Ask about skills you should develop...
coach.emptyChat: Chat with your AI career coach
coach.emptyResume: Get feedback on your profile and resume
coach.emptyInterview: Practice with a realistic mock interview
coach.emptySkills: Discover skills to develop for your target opportunities
coach.startHint: Type a message below to get started.

prechat.title: AI Pre-chat
prechat.privacyNote: Your contact information will not be shared during the pre-chat. AI protects your privacy.
prechat.replyHint: Type your reply to add information AI might have missed...

memory.title: AI Memory Space
memory.description: Memory accumulated by AI from your conversations. You can view and edit these entries.

upload.dropLabel: Drag & drop files here, or click to browse
